About Products Distributors Contact

Precision widgets for the people who keep things running.

Acme Widgets has been manufacturing precision industrial widgets in Toledo, Ohio since 1972. Our products are used by OEMs and authorized distributors across the United States and Canada. Every widget is machined to ANSI tolerance on our shop floor — no offshoring, no shortcuts.

What we make

  • Series A — General purpose widgets, 1.5" to 4" diameter
  • Series B — High-temperature widgets, rated to 800°F
  • Series C — Corrosion-resistant widgets, 316L stainless

Get in touch

Support: support@acmewidgets.example
Phone: 1-800-555-0144
